text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder and I are returning from a photo
shoot she had in her signature racewear. We're
walking down the hallway when I realize
something.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer? Is something the matter?
choice_data_list:
I was just thinking, the crest on your top
matches the badge you wear on your ear.

I was just thinking, the crest on your top
matches the badge you wear on your ear.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you have a good eye for details. Yes, it's
the same symbol.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Did you know? It looks like a "G" if you look at it
from the side.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, my... Sei? How long have you been listening?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, does that mean I got it right? Been curious
for a while, actually.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Is the G supposed to be your initial? Or does it
stand for something else, like "Grace"?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now, isn't that a good question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun keeps pressing for an answer, but Grass
Wonder evades the question every time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up the next morning still curious about the
design. Later, as I wait for Grass Wonder for
training...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Trainer. Hehe, why do you look so
perplexed?
choice_data_list:
I'm still trying to work out what the "G" stands
for...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, I should've told you yesterday, but I was
a bit too embarrassed to answer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's just what Sei said—the "G" stands for both my
name and "Grace."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a lot more to Grass Wonder than just
being graceful and polite. Perhaps that's why her
explanation doesn't sit quite right with me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But?
choice_data_list: There has to be more to it than that.
There has to be more to it than that.
It could mean "Green Tea" too, couldn't it?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But?
choice_data_list: There has to be more to it than that.
There has to be more to it than that.
It could mean "Green Tea" too, couldn't it?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well... Um.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. As a matter of fact, there is. You're quite
astute.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
To be honest... I'm a little flattered that you
noticed. Not many people do, you know.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but that's all I'll say for now. It's about time
we started training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gracefully steps out onto the track, but then
suddenly turns to face me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I can tell you one last thing. I like to
always carry a reminder of what's important to
me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And as you know, my ambitions are not easily
satisfied. So I hope you will aid me in achieving...
the goals I seek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following week, she claims an impressive
victory in a race. Seeing the strength of her desire
to win, I'm filled with a renewed determination to
support her no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. Well... It definitely does now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The symbol represents what's important to me,
and green tea certainly fits the bill.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Still... it makes me happy that you've put so much
thought into such a tiny aspect of my racewear.
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So I suppose... I'll let you in on my secret. This
stays between us, understood?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She smiles, leans in close, and whispers a single
word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following week, Grass Wonder claims an
impressive victory during a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Struck by her determination to succeed, I quietly
renew my own resolve to support her until the day
she achieves... the glory she deserves.
